title: Add input validation to Calculator
body:
The Calculator struct accepts any input without validation. Add a throwing variant that raises an error for special float values (NaN, infinity).

Files to investigate:
- FlowQA/Calculator.swift
- FlowQATests/CalculatorTests.swift

title: Add subtraction support to Calculator
body:
The Calculator only supports addition. Add a subtract method that returns the difference of two numbers.

Files to investigate:
- FlowQA/Calculator.swift
- FlowQATests/CalculatorTests.swift

title: Add multiplication support to Calculator
body:
The Calculator needs a multiply method. Should handle zero and negative numbers correctly.

Files to investigate:
- FlowQA/Calculator.swift
- FlowQATests/CalculatorTests.swift

title: Add division support with zero-division handling
body:
Add a divide method to Calculator. Must return nil when dividing by zero and return a Double for non-integer results.

Files to investigate:
- FlowQA/Calculator.swift
- FlowQATests/CalculatorTests.swift
